recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Expires: 60 Content-Length: [len]

NOTIFY sip:[$5] SIP/2.0 Subscription-State: active;expires=10 From: <sip:[$localNo]@[local_ip]>;tag=2 To[$3] Cseq: 2 NOTIFY [last_Call-ID:] Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Contact: [$localContact] Max-Forwards: 69 User-Agent: AvayaTest Event: nena-ServiceState Service-State: Normal Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary="Boundary-1579758416180" Content-Length: [len]
--Boundary-1579758416180 Content-Type: application/dialog-info+xml
<?xml version="1.0"?> <dialog-info xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:dialog-info" xmlns:av="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" xmlns:sa="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" version="0" state="full" entity="sip:4001@ci.com"> </dialog-info> --Boundary-1579758416180 Content-Type: application/dialog-info+xml
<?xml version="1.0"?> <dialog-info xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:dialog-info" xmlns:av="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" xmlns:sa="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" version="0" state="full" entity="sip:4002@ci.com"> </dialog-info>
--Boundary-1579758416180--
